Menu.Title: Custom Skills
Menu.Name: Custom Skills
Menu.Label: Manage Custom Skills
Menu.Hint: Define custom roll-skills (e.g. the Spiritual skill "Desperation"). They appear on every character sheet under their chosen attribute.
Menu.Intro: Add custom skills below. Each is tied to an attribute (grouped Physical / Cognitive / Spiritual) and shows on every character sheet with an editable rank and a roll button. Changes take effect after a world reload.
Menu.Empty: No custom skills yet. Click "Add Skill" to create one.

Errors.MissingLabel: Every custom skill needs a name.
Errors.MissingId: Could not derive an identifier from the name; please enter one manually (letters/numbers only).
Errors.MissingAttribute: Choose an attribute for the skill "{label}".
Errors.ReservedId: The identifier "{id}" is already used by a built-in skill. Choose another.
Errors.DuplicateId: The identifier "{id}" is used more than once. Identifiers must be unique.
